package rulecoverage

func NegativeBackgroundWorkerStartedFromHttpHandlerRegistration() string {
    ruleID := "background_worker_started_from_http_handler_registration"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Route or middleware setup that also starts unrelated background jobs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
